name: Fade In
description: New page gently fades in while the current page fades out. A subtle, universal transition that works well for any navigation pattern.
demoAnimations: @keyframes fade-in-exit { from { opacity: 1; } to { opacity: 0; } } @keyframes fade-in-enter { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } } .fade-in-exit { animation: fade-in-exit 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94) forwards; } .fade-in-enter { animation: fade-in-enter 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94) forwards; }

transitions/fade-in/link.tsx
